text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around the academy, I
spot Bamboo Memory and Sakura Chiyono O
standing next to one another in mysterious poses.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can't believe even this kind of special
training doesn't phase you! You're really
something else!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! But to tell you the truth, I'm really
feeling it in my legs!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Actually...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Sakura Chiyono O saw Bamboo
Memory swinging her practice sword and asked
for a kendo lesson.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The way Bamboo swung her bamboo blade was so
beautiful, I couldn't help but want to emulate her!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And how could I say no after hearing something
like that?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We started off with the fundamental sonkyo
stance, where you bend your knees while
crouching!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sonkyo is also practice for controlling your
emotions! According to my dad...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
"You can't have a real match without Sonkyo! It
shows how much you value decorum!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Now, it's about time to start our next lesson!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Next up, one lap around the track in the
suriashi foot slide technique!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A foot slide?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! My dad also told me that nothing can
shake you if you dedicate yourself properly to all
the fundamentals.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yup! So let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now for the last one! Ready to try swinging a
practice sword?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, Sakura Chiyono O concludes her basic
training by taking her best shot at swinging a
practice sword.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a hint of flattery, I can say Sakura
Chiyono O swings the practice sword in a straight
and beautiful arc.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... did it! I really managed to pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You sure did! Great job! That was beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It was wonderful! It's all thanks to you, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No way! In fact, I should be thanking you! You've
helped me get one step closer to fulfilling a
dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My father is honest and direct, and I want to be
just like him.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You want to be like your father?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And today I was able to use the
methods he taught me to get real results.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That means I'm one step closer to that dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If I do my best and keep this up, I'm confident
that I'll be able to stand proudly beside him one
day!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you can do it!
Think you could teach me too?
Think you could teach me too?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If I do my best and keep this up, I'm confident
that I'll be able to stand proudly beside him one
day!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you can do it!
Think you could teach me too?
Think you could teach me too?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I wonder...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, no! I need to look more solemn!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. That's what my dad always used to tell
himself after I won a match! ...Even though he was
still smiling a little!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think I've gotta try and restrain myself too if I
want to be like him! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if that's something she really needs
to take so seriously, but it's kind of funny, so I
decide not to say anything.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! You want to learn kendo too?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we'll start by clearing our minds in the
sonkyo crouch! Ready? Go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No time like the present! Besides, you're my
trainer! You can definitely do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With some encouragement from Bamboo
Memory, I spend the day learning the sonkyo
stance.
